nodes.label: AI as time-saving lesson planning tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI has saved me so much time in this area

nodes.label: AI as flexible and editable assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I am able to edit the lesson plans quickly and easily

nodes.label: Human-driven creative control over AI
nodes.label_negative: AI-driven creative decisions overriding human intent
nodes.grounding_span: I am driving the creative decisions

nodes.label: AI as creativity enhancer by reducing overwhelm
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch that stifles creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I find that I am more creative

nodes.label: AI as tool versus crutch
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch replacing human skill
nodes.grounding_span: I would hate to see choreographers use it as a crutch rather than a tool

nodes.label: Preservation of human essence and individuality in dance
nodes.label_negative: Uniform cookie-cutter dance due to AI
nodes.grounding_span: Dance is distinctly human. I would hate to see the art become too uniform

nodes.label: AI learning and adapting to personal choreographic style
nodes.grounding_span: AI could eventually learn my choreography style and apply that

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: AI has saved me so much time

nodes.label: Creative freedom and exploration
nodes.grounding_span: I am able to explore the possibilities more deeply

nodes.label: Positive relief from overwhelm
nodes.grounding_span: This made me feel much less overwhelmed

nodes.label: Concern about AI making dance uniform
nodes.grounding_span: I would hate to see a time where the art of dance becomes too uniform

nodes.label: Aspiration to use AI as tool not crutch
nodes.grounding_span: I need to do a better job at navigating it myself

nodes.label: Optimism about AI learning personal style
nodes.grounding_span: I would love if AI could eventually learn my choreography style

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through specific prompting and redirection
nodes.grounding_span: I am very specific in my prompts... If I feel the AI is getting off track, I will redirect

nodes.label: Intentional skill-building to maintain independence from AI
nodes.grounding_span: I plan on blocking off time to make lesson plans completely without the help of AI
